expectations.text: Acknowledges getting weaker during the cut
expectations.evidence: Provides general advice, not personal experience of getting weaker.

expectations.text: Attributes much of the strength loss to disrupted training (injury) rather than fat loss alone
expectations.evidence: No mention of injury disrupting training.

expectations.text: Mentions a specific injury (wrist/elbow) that limited training
Notes that strength rebounded quickly once consistent lifting resumed
expectations.evidence: No discussion of personal strength rebound.

expectations.text: Frames consistency and acceptance as more important than chasing perfect in-cut numbers
expectations.evidence: Recommends maintaining training consistency and moderate deficits.
